zh.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny是William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny和Mabel de Chester的女兒，出生。她與Roger de Montalt結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1261年6月18日在英國英格蘭爾，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny是William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny和Mabel de Chester的女儿，出生。她与Roger de Montalt结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1261年6月18日在英国英格兰爾，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny was born as the daughter of William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny and Mabel de Chester. She married Roger de Montalt. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 18 June 1261, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny est née, fille de William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny et Mabel de Chester. Elle a épousé Roger de Montalt. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 juin 1261, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny wurde, als Tochter von William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny und Mabel de Chester geboren. Sie hat Roger de Montalt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. Juni 1261 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

ht.of Montalt, Flints, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny è nata il come figlia di William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny e Mabel de Chester. Lei sposato Roger de Montalt. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 18 giugno 1261, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily d'AubignyはWilliam V 'the Crusader' d'AubignyとMabel de Chesterの娘として生まれた。Roger de Montaltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1261年6月18日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny(은)는 William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny(와)과 Mabel de Chester의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Roger de Montalt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 6월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny nasceu filha de William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny e Mabel de Chester. Ela casou-se com Roger de Montalt. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 18 de junho de 1261, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny родилась. Её родителей звали William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny и Mabel de Chester. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Montalt. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 18 июня 1261 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cecily d'Aubigny nació como hija de William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny y Mabel de Chester. Se casó con Roger de Montalt. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 18 de junio de 1261, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
